title: Release note handoff
skillStatus: Current and structurally valid; not installed
verdict: Two consequential revisions improve decision clarity without changing ownership.
scope: Review the publication request for clarity, timing, and preserved decision rights <without inventing approval>.
protectedMeaning: The release owner retains the final publication decision.
The request remains reviewable before the Friday deadline.

evidenceBoundaries.label: Reviewed source
evidenceBoundaries.detail: The supplied release-note handoff and its explicit deadline.

evidenceBoundaries.label: Not reviewed
evidenceBoundaries.detail: No deployment logs, private chat, or unstated approval policy.

findings.title: Name the decision owner

original.text: Please review the release note and send it when ready. Please review the timing separately.

proposal.text: Please review the release note; the release owner will publish it after approval. Please review the timing separately.
proposal.target: the release owner will publish it after approval

findings.evidence: The source assigns review to the recipient but does not transfer publication ownership.
findings.changed: The proposal names the release owner as publisher.
findings.whyItMatters: It removes an accidental transfer of decision rights.
findings.whyBetter: The action and owner are explicit.
findings.preserved: The recipient still reviews the note before publication.

findings.title: Replace a relative deadline

original.text: Return comments soon so we can publish on Friday.

proposal.text: Return comments by 15:00 UTC Thursday so we can publish on Friday.

findings.evidence: The source establishes Friday publication but leaves the review cutoff unresolved.
findings.changed: The relative timing word becomes a testable cutoff.
findings.whyItMatters: Reviewers can tell whether the request is still actionable.
findings.whyBetter: The timing is concrete without changing the publication date.
findings.preserved: Friday remains the intended publication day.

finalOutput.heading: Complete proposed revision
finalOutput.content:
Please review the release note and return comments by 15:00 UTC Thursday. The release owner will publish it after approval for Friday’s release.

Questions & exceptions should remain in the review thread.

method.decisionSummary: Candidates were retained only when they improved actionability, evidence alignment, or preserved decision rights.
method.noChangeReason: A no-change result would have been returned if every candidate were cosmetic or meaning-reducing.

redactions: A private customer identifier was replaced with a descriptive label.
assumptions: The stated Thursday cutoff uses UTC.
